positive: A symmetrical, intricate mandala-style design featuring stylized botanical elements—such as laurel leaves, ferns, and cosmos flowers—intertwined with celestial motifs like crescent moons, constellations, and small shooting stars. The style must be high-contrast black ink vector line art illustration, with subtle, muted colors like dusty sage green and deep navy blue used only as accent fills. The composition is perfectly centered, highly detailed, clean silhouette art, optimized for screen printing on apparel. Minimalist, elegant, and symmetrical.
